loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_rule.int_account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_interest_rate, '' as mix_interest_rate, '' as period_calculate_month, '' as minimum_balance, '' as status_account, sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.effective_date, '' as latest_update, '' as status_using, '' as entry_id, '' as entry_date FROM sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_lon_m_int_step_rate WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.int_account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_type ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ASC, sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.effective_date ASC
